g.text: Fabric-private ALZ — Microsoft Fabric with Private Connectivity

network_mode = "inbound_and_outbound" (3 modes available: inbound_only | outbound_only | inbound_and_outbound) Spoke VNet + NSG + vHub connection + DNS resolver policy link always deploy in all modes.
PE Subnet 172.20.80.0/24 • NSG: allow TCP 443 + 1433 inbound/outbound from VNet • deny-all default
Managed Private Endpoints (outbound — from Fabric managed VNet to spoke resources)
MPEs land as "Pending" on target resource.
is the failure mode to watch for.
🟦 Azure networking 🟩 Private Endpoints (inbound) 🟧 Outbound data resources (no public access) 🟪 Fabric workspace + MPEs ── solid = inbound path ╌╌ dashed = outbound MPE / RBAC
